chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No. S-167 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 01.09.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Indhar, Advocate for applicant M/s Ali Raza Balouch and Saeed Ahmed Wasan AAGs Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General SIP Ghulam Sarwar Mirani, SHO PS Adilpur, Atta Muhammad Soomro, PDSP on behalf of SSP Ghotki ************** Official respondent No.5 has submitted a progress report reflecting that the absconding accused, namely Ali Nawaz, Waheed Ali @ Abdul Waheed, and Mst. Shahnaz, have been granted pre-arrest bail by the Court of Additional Sessions Judge-I, Ghotki. Consequently, the present Constitution Petition, to the extent of prayer clauses (a) and (b), has become infructuous. However, with regard to prayer clause (c), the official respondents are directed not to cause harassment to the applicant and to act in accordance with law. It is further clarified that this order shall not affect any inquiry, investigation, or trial, if already pending against the applicant before any competent forum. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition stands disposed of. J U D G E M. Ali*
